questions.question: Explain the Big O notation and its importance in algorithm analysis. Provide an example of a Big O notation where the time complexity is O(1), O(log n), O(n), and O(n log n).
What are the characteristics of an efficient algorithm? List two examples of inefficient algorithms and explain why they are inefficient.
Describe the difference between a recursive and an iterative solution to a problem. Provide an example of each.
